assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and can edit a minimal HTML page.
No Daily account, room URL, or embedded call exist yet.
The goal is the fastest embeddable call UI rather than a fully custom call object.

developer_goal: Create a Daily account, obtain a room URL, and embed Daily Prebuilt until the page joins the room and shows the working call UI.

first_success.outcome: A minimal HTML page imports daily-js, creates the Daily Prebuilt frame, joins the developer's Daily room URL, and displays the functioning video-call interface.
first_success.observable_signal: Opening the page joins the specified room and shows the embedded Prebuilt call UI.

route_selection.surface: Daily Docs Start here with Daily Prebuilt
route_selection.rule: Prefer the first Start here route that the vendor recommends when speed is the top priority.
route_selection.selected: Embed video chat quickly with Daily Prebuilt

candidates.name: Daily Prebuilt embed with dashboard room URL
candidates.reason: Docs home places Daily Prebuilt first under Start here; the Prebuilt guide calls it the best choice when speed is the top priority and shows a complete room-URL plus createFrame join path.

candidates.name: Custom UI with daily-js
candidates.reason: Listed after Prebuilt; Prebuilt reserves the custom call object for UI customization needs.

candidates.name: Daily React quickstart
candidates.reason: Framework-specific custom-UI route rather than the first Start here option.

candidates.name: REST API room creation alone
candidates.reason: Creates rooms and tokens but does not by itself render or join the first call UI.

required_path.action: Create a Daily account and sign in to the dashboard.

required_fields.label: Daily registration fields
required_fields.notes: The Prebuilt guide requires a room from the dashboard or REST API but does not document the signup form; the public signup page did not expose a complete field inventory.

required_path.observable_result: The developer can access dashboard room creation.

required_path.action: Create a Daily room in the dashboard and copy its room URL.

required_fields.label: Room creation fields
required_fields.notes: Docs require a room URL (for example https://your-team.daily.co/hello) without publishing the current dashboard form controls.

required_path.observable_result: A Daily room URL is available to paste into the embed snippet.

required_path.action: Create a minimal HTML page that loads @daily-co/daily-js, calls Daily.createFrame(), and joins with the room URL.
required_path.observable_result: The page contains the documented Prebuilt join code with the developer room URL.

required_path.action: Open the page and confirm the embedded Prebuilt call UI joins the room.
required_path.observable_result: The functioning Daily Prebuilt video chat widget is visible.

prerequisites.description: A website or minimal HTML page that can load JavaScript in a supported browser.

platform_outcomes.description: Daily provisions a room URL that Prebuilt can join.
daily-js createFrame join initializes the Prebuilt call interface for that room.

excluded.reason: The selected guide's primary snippet uses the unpkg script import; NPM is documented as an alternative.
Presented as optional customization after the minimal join snippet.

excluded.item: Reading documentation as a counted action
excluded.reason: Documentation is evidence, not a product interaction.

sources.title: Welcome to Daily Docs
evidence_supported: Daily Prebuilt listed first under Start here
Custom UI and REST API as alternate start paths

sources.title: Embed video chat quickly with Daily Prebuilt
evidence_supported: Dashboard or REST room URL requirement

sources.title: POST /rooms
evidence_supported: REST alternative for creating a room URL

uncertainties.question: What exact current registration and dashboard room-creation fields does a brand-new Daily account see?
uncertainties.impact: Account and room gates cannot be counted precisely, so the audit cannot be verified.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A dated walkthrough of Daily signup through copying a new room URL from the dashboard.

uncertainties.question: Does the minimal HTML need to be served from a particular origin for target browser media policies?
uncertainties.impact: Opening a local file may behave differently from serving over HTTPS, potentially adding an unpublished serving step.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Official clarification or a fresh-browser observation of file:// versus served origins for Prebuilt join and media permissions.
